_schema: 6-beat structure per CLAUDE.md law 5. ALL text below is scratch placeholder awaiting Director wording (law 6).

intro.speaker: sandy
intro.text: [Situation — Sandy at the scale window, tired, logbook open. Trucks idle behind you.]

options.text: [IT option — offer her your delivery-timing model in exchange for dock priority.]
options.label: [IT Nephew]

options.text: [BLANK P-OS — perk option (Read the Land II): the player reads the weather in the fields and offers Sandy hauling timing no chart could give her. Awaiting Director.]
options.label: [Read the Land]

timing_success.speaker: sandy
timing_success.text: [Result — she tries your schedule for a week and it works. You unload first from now on. She won't say thank you twice.]

timing_failure.speaker: sandy
timing_failure.text: [Good failure — your model jammed her Tuesday line for two hours. Every farmer in that line knows whose idea it was.]

land_read.speaker: sandy
land_read.text: [BLANK P-OS-R — Sandy, surprised into respect: the old ways just beat her logbook. Awaiting Director.]

chat.speaker: sandy
chat.text: [Flavor — one dry observation about who's hauling what. This is Old School's market signal, so it should hint at price direction.]
